mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_answer WHERE exam_id=#{examId};
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_answer WHERE mark_exams IS NOT NULL AND mark_exams!='' AND exam_id=#{examId};
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_paper WHERE exam_id=#{examId};
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_paper WHERE exam_id=#{examId};
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_answer WHERE exam_id=#{examId};
